recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Never Look Away
recommendations.overview: German artist Kurt Barnert has escaped East Germany and now lives in West Germany, but is tormented by his childhood under the Nazis and the GDR regime.

recommendations.title: Selena
recommendations.overview: In this biographical drama, Selena Quintanilla is born into a musical Mexican-American family in Texas. Her father, Abraham, realizes that his young daughter is talented and begins performing with her at small venues. She finds success and falls for

recommendations.title: King Richard
recommendations.overview: The story of how Richard Williams served as a coach to his daughters Venus and Serena, who will soon become two of the most legendary tennis players in history.

recommendations.title: Aguirre, the Wrath of God
recommendations.overview: A few decades after the destruction of the Inca Empire, a Spanish expedition led by the infamous Aguirre leaves the mountains of Peru and goes down the Amazon River in search of the lost city of El Dorado. When great difficulties arise, Aguirre’s men

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Escape from Pretoria
recommendations.overview: South Africa, 1978. Tim Jenkin and Stephen Lee, two white political activists from the African National Congress imprisoned by the apartheid regime, put a plan in motion to escape from the infamous Pretoria Prison.

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: American Woman
recommendations.overview: A young grandmother in a small Pennsylvania town raises her daughter's child after the girl disappears. All the while, a desperate search for her continues.
